case_title: NOE CAPITAL INC. VS. REY STOTOMAS et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUL-20-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT REY STOTOMAS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
